## Documented outcomes (publish-safe)

- Multifamily acquisitions structured: $5.88M (2 properties)
- Purchase-price savings via CMA + financial modeling: $350K+
- Rental portfolio operations: 30 units (high occupancy; no invented %)
- STAT 198 Head Instructor (Poker Theory): 400+ students, 3 semesters; largest DeCal at UC Berkeley
- TEDx Lead Organizer (2018): 200K+ YouTube views
- Oxford Map the System (Summer 2022): Algorithmic Bias in Online Hiring Systems

## Experience

1. Navigara — GTM and Sales Engineer (Feb 2026 – Present, San Francisco)
2. Piedmont Realty LLC — Quantitative Real Estate Analyst (Jan 2024 – Sep 2024, Oakland)
3. Independent Practice — Quantitative Analyst (Nov 2021 – Dec 2023)

## Honesty

Do not invent occupancy percentages, Mag 7 closed revenue/deal sizes, model accuracy, lift, or ROI figures not listed above.
Items marked basics/concepts on the site are adjacent skills, not multi-year production ownership claims.
